title: Cute Potions
description: Cute Potions is a charming, minimalist texture pack that transforms all Minecraft potions and bottles with soft colors and simple, adorable designs.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1856cee77d3bea505b4ef59315b568ff2546af66.png)


## 🧪 Cute Potions

Let’s be honest — vanilla potions are… fine.
But do they spark joy?
Do they look like something you’d happily sip on a cozy evening in your Minecraft base?

Yeah. Not really.

Cute Potions is a soft, minimalistic resource pack that redesigns all potion textures to be more charming, friendly, and aesthetically pleasing. No clutter, no over-the-top details — just clean shapes, gentle colors, and cozy vibes.

Now your inventory won’t look like a chemistry accident — it’ll look like a cute little potion shelf straight out of a wholesome fantasy world.

## Perfect for:

- 🧁 Cozy survival worlds
- 🏡 Cottagecore & aesthetic builds
- 🌿 Soft fantasy / fairy vibes
- 🎮 Players who love clean and minimal visuals
- 🛌 Late-night Minecraft sessions with comfy shaders

## 💌 Credits

Made with love, pixels, and a strong belief that potions shouldn’t look like liquid danger.

Enjoy the cozy vibes — and drink responsibly (or at least cutely). 🧪✨
